description: The model answers from parametric memory when retrieval returned nothing relevant, inventing facts the corpus does not support.
body: Failure mode: retrieval returns empty or low-relevance passages but the system still answers, so the model fills the gap from its own training, producing confident facts with no corpus support. Detection signals: no relevance threshold or abstention path; answers appear even when top passages are off-topic; no test for a no-result query. Do not fall back to parametric knowledge while implying the corpus backed it. Safer fallback: set a relevance threshold, detect empty/low-confidence retrieval, return an explicit 'no grounded answer', and test that a query with no relevant content abstains rather than fabricates.
